steps.title: Write each cost term
steps.content: The bread costs $3$ dollars. The cherries cost $1.40$ dollars per pound, so $p$ pounds of cherries cost $1.40p$ dollars.

steps.title: Set the total cost
steps.content:
Add the cherry cost and bread cost, then set the sum equal to the total paid.
$$1.40p+3=8.60$$
The answer is A.
